_doc: REQ-AXO-902017 in-repo validation fixture for data-artifact IST ingestion. AXO is tenant zero (no native data lake), so this minimal normalized catalog lets `data_catalog action=index catalog_path=tests/fixtures/data_catalog/CATALOG.json` be exercised end-to-end against the dogfood project. Real data-centric tenants generate the catalog from their manifests.
